notes:
## v2.3.0

### New Features
* **Owner-Only Cards** — Restrict HUD cards to character owners only. GM always sees all.
* **Selected Token Display** — Cards appear only when a token is selected. Works with NPCs too.
* **Qualitative HP Display** — Show Healthy/Wounded/Bloodied/Critical/Dead instead of numbers for non-owners. Configurable thresholds, labels, and colors.
* **Full Configuration Presets** — Save/load/export/import your entire configuration.
* **Portrait Clip (Custom Theme)** — Clip portraits to Rectangle, Circle, or Diamond.
* **GM HUD Broadcast Toggle** — Hide/show HUD for all players (📡 button or Shift+G).
* **Action Menu End Turn** — Hourglass button to advance combat from the Action Menu.
* **Category & Tab Visibility** — Combat-based category visibility + per-tab actor filtering.

### Bug Fixes
* Fixed text attribute values showing as 0.
* Fixed position fields resetting to 0.
* Fixed Action Menu ghost duplicate in top-left corner.

announcement.title: v2.3.0: Visibility Control, Qualitative HP & Presets
announcement.content: Owner-only cards, selected token mode, qualitative HP display with custom labels/colors, full configuration presets, portrait clip, GM broadcast toggle, action menu end turn button, and category/tab visibility filtering.
